title: Non-record: 1x RTX 4090 compat smoke (50 steps)
author: stukenov

data.description: Input and output embeddings are tied.
Uses fewer KV heads than attention heads, with manual KV expansion before SDPA for CUDA/PyTorch compatibility.
Manual KV-head expansion before scaled dot product attention to work around a PyTorch build that does not accept enable_gqa=.

novel_contributions: Finished non-record smoke submission with complete logs and final metrics
CUDA compatibility patch for PyTorch builds lacking enable_gqa support in scaled_dot_product_attention
Manual KV-head expansion before SDPA to preserve reproducibility on the Vast.ai image
Single RTX 4090 run on fixed full FineWeb validation split with one training shard
